name: Slime
description:
The New Slime you kept for a pet

(Heres the source code btw just in case)

import time class PurpleSlime: def __init__(self): self.hunger = 10 self.health = 10 self.aggression = 10 def feed(self): if self.hunger < 10: self.hunger += 2 self.aggression -= 1 print("You feed the slime. It seems a little less hungry and a bit calmer.") else: print("The slime is not hungry right now.") self.status() def play(self): if self.aggression > 0: self.aggression -= 2 print("You play with the slime.
